title: Pholidia dichroantha
taxonomy: Pholidia dichroantha is a species within the family Ericaceae. It belongs to the order Ericales. The family Ericaceae consists of flowering plants commonly known as heath or heather plants. Pholidia dichroantha is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. Further classification is typically based on phylogenetic relationships within the family.
